commands.review_summary:
This PR moves Skill Workshop from a bundled plugin into a core skills subsystem with proposal storage, an agent tool, CLI/Gateway APIs, Skill Research auto-capture, docs, generated protocol surfaces, and removal of the plugin package.

PR surface: Source +2555, Tests +1305, Docs -869, Config -18, Other +327. Total +3300 across 80 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the merge blockers by source inspection: released plugin config exists in the latest tag, the new resolver ignores it, the core tool is always added to non-sandboxed tool sets, and the merge result reverts the QMD timestamp guard. No runtime repro was run because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR needs human/security/product decisions; repair automation should not choose the core rollout, migration/deprecation, or dependency approval path.
